# Delteris / Elenchon

> Engineering the technology for Europe's future.

Elenchon is on-premise welding traceability software for fabrication shops and heavy industry. It runs the full WPS/PQR/WPQ qualification workflow, automates ISO and ASME IX compliance ledgers, captures shop-floor data in seconds, and keeps every weld record on the client's own hardware via Phrakton — Delteris's zero-trust network overlay built on OpenZiti and secured with post-quantum cryptography.

## Core Pillars
- Zero-Friction Work Capture (10-second navigation, universal work templates)
- One Project, Two Live Views (Tree & Flowchart, one-paste BOM import from Tekla/CAD)
- Management & Access Control (global custom roles, one-click document generation)
- Qualifications & Procedures (WPS/PQR/WPQ workflow, 6-month continuity tracking, heat propagation)
- Floor Asset & Consumable Control (maintenance hub, machine certification tracking, batch inventory)
- Bulletproof Data Sovereignty (on-premise appliance, automated local backups, post-quantum-safe encryption)

## Pricing (EUR, per appliance, per month, excl. VAT)
- Lite: €490/month, 20 workers included. The full traceability core — work capture, project tree and flowchart, BOM import, WPS/PQR/WPQ workflow, ISO & ASME IX ledgers, preset roles, Phrakton networking, local backups, founder support by email. Expandable once, by a single 10-worker block, to a 30-worker ceiling.
- Standard: €880/month, 50 workers included. Everything in Lite plus the full platform (all six pillars), floor asset and consumable control, global custom roles, a pre-deployment on-site scoping session, a repeatable on-site training programme, unlimited worker expansion blocks, and direct founder support.
- Premium: coming soon.
- Add-ons: Remote Access Module €200/month (incl. 100 GB); Additional Workers €90/month per block of 10, each block including 20 GB of recurring remote bandwidth free; Remote Bandwidth €25 per 100 GB.
- Plan changes: upgrades, downgrades and add-ons are applied remotely over the Phrakton fabric at no charge — no engineer visit, no commute fee. Upgrades apply immediately; downgrades at the next billing cycle.
- One-time: Lite Deployment & Training package €1,100 (installation plus one training session, no pre-deployment scoping visit); Standard On-Site Deployment €850 and Floor Training €850; Server Appliance ~€300–400 at cost; On-Site Commute Fee €150/visit.
- Uptime: 99.9% monthly commitment on the Phrakton fabric, with automatic invoice credits of 10%, 25% or 50% when missed.
- No per-audit fees, no lock-in — customers who cancel keep permanent view-only access to historical data for audits.

## Deployment
Three steps: scoping session with the founders, on-site installation of the hardware appliance, then onboarding and go-live. Deployment slots per quarter are limited because every appliance is installed on-site by Delteris engineers. Lite deployments skip the pre-deployment scoping visit and include a single training session.
